category_sources: source_facts.description: Top-like tool for your Kubernetes clusters; official README describes metrics for nodes, pods, and workloads.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and official GitHub repository name are ktop.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README points to ktop's website for documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/vladimirvivien/ktop, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official README topics include kubernetes, metrics, kubectl-plugin; source_facts.executables lists ktop CLI.
